refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump phases to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-FRs for each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows targeted design and verification of each phase's contribution to overall cycle time.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for each sub-phase under representative duty cycles and site conditions, then aggregate to verify overall cycle time target.

candidate_dps: Optimize load operation via automated control and sensor feedback
Optimize travel path and speed using dynamic route planning
Optimize dump operation with synchronized actuator control
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize load operation via automated control and sensor feedback; Optimize travel path and speed using dynamic route planning; Optimize dump operation with synchronized actuator control

potential_sources: Interdependency between load and travel timing
Coordination between travel and dump phases
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by phase but require interface coordination; modular control algorithms can manage coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensor data and reliable actuator response
Risk of cycle time degradation if site conditions vary beyond modeled scenarios
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding explicit interface FRs to manage phase transitions and timing coordination.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level coordination and optimization of load, travel, and dump phases

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Provides real-time sensor data and status feedback for cycle time optimization

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands and cycle time targets from higher-level control

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Interfaces with safety services to ensure cycle time optimization does not compromise safety

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of cycle time optimization logic; low diffusion as logic is centralized
Vehicle controls contribute to phase execution but do not contain full optimization logic
Teleoperation may influence cycle time but is not primary containment
Safety services interface but do not contain cycle time optimization logic

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module if all optimization logic is centralized
Risk of interface overload with Vehicle and Safety Services modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate splitting optimization logic into submodules within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the original requirement into manageable sub-FRs; selected DPs logically address each sub-FR with acceptable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Centralizing all optimization logic in NGHE Solution may increase module complexity
Interfaces with Vehicle and Safety Services must be well-defined to avoid diffusion
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as primary ownership; diffusion is low but should be monitored.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and cycle time measurements at the NGHE Solution level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit interface FRs for phase transition coordination
Consider modularizing NGHE Solution to reduce complexity
Define detailed interface protocols with Vehicle and Safety Services

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments meet requirements and architectural clarity; no immediate need to zigzag or revise.

revise.why: No critical issues identified requiring revision at this level.

assumptions: Sensor and actuator reliability within expected parameters
Site conditions remain within modeled scenarios
open_risks: Complexity management in NGHE Solution module
Interface definition completeness with Vehicle and Safety Services
evidence_needed: Telemetry data validating cycle time improvements per phase
Interface performance metrics between NGHE Solution and other modules
